title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Lite Bite Foods

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Lite Bite Foods
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods:
Lite Bite Foods is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods!
